# NeMo Relay ATOF fixture provenance

`nemo_relay_atof_v0.1_real_redacted.jsonl` is shape-preserving, privacy-redacted
evidence from the bundled Hermes NeMo Relay producer. It was generated in an
isolated temporary Hermes home on 2026-07-18 by exercising its session, API,
tool, approval, error, and subagent callbacks; no live Hermes profile or
archive input was used.

The private source stream SHA-256 is
`7bc7efad90c8f6e2c31c7b1eadf881ee4767861c7589df1af7adbd51c776ca3d`.
The fixture preserves the producer's ATOF v0.1 envelope, scope UUID pairing,
names/categories, and field presence while replacing identifiers, prompts,
headers, commands, outputs, and error text. It intentionally contains no
fixture-invented detector marker.
